channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Legal tussle over President Ruto's call to Gachagua’s doctor during 2024 impeachment
item.description: A fresh courtroom battle has emerged between Deputy President Kithure Kindiki and his predecessor Rigathi Gachagua over claims that President William Ruto personally contacted Gachagua's cardiologist ...

item.title: Madlanga Commission of Inquiry Resumes in Pretoria
item.description: The Madlanga commission of inquiry is continuing its proceedings in Pretoria, focusing on allegations of criminality, political interference, and corruption within South Africa's criminal justice syst...

item.title: Americans Across the Political Spectrum Agree on What Makes a Good Teacher
item.description: Despite highly politicized debates surrounding education in the United States, a recent study reveals that Americans, regardless of political affiliation, share surprisingly similar views on what cons...

item.title: Evacuation Ordered as Wildfire Spreads Near Whitecourt, Alberta
item.description: An out-of-control wildfire has led authorities to issue an immediate evacuation south of Whitecourt, Alberta. The fire is burning east of Range Road 114 and south of Highway 43, affecting areas includ...

item.title: Man Detained for Possessing Live Bullets During Assam CM's Swearing-In Ceremony
item.description: On 12th May 2026, a man was taken into custody at the swearing-in venue of Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sharma after security personnel discovered live bullets on him during the screening at the...

item.title: Federal Budget 2026: Chalmers outlines economic measures amid public financial concerns
item.description: The 2026 federal budget, presented by Treasurer Jim Chalmers, aims to address growing economic concerns among Australians. While the headline $45 billion improvement over four years signals a commitme...

item.title: Sen. Cornyn Signals Support for Temporary Gas Tax Suspension Following Trump's Endorsement of Opponent's Proposal
item.description: Senator John Cornyn of Texas initially criticized a proposal from his Democratic challenger, James Talarico, to suspend the federal gas tax amid rising fuel prices caused by conflict in Iran. Cornyn l...

item.title: SERAP Files Appeal Against ₦100 Million Defamation Ruling by DSS Officials
item.description: The Socio-Economic Rights and Accountability Project (SERAP) don challenge the ₦100 million defamation judgment wey the High Court of the Federal Capital Territory, Abuja, don give for two DSS officia...

item.title: Adam Ramsay-Peaty set to chase fourth consecutive Commonwealth Games swimming gold
item.description: Adam Ramsay-Peaty, three-time Olympic swimming champion, has confirmed his participation in this summer’s Commonwealth Games, representing Team England. The 31-year-old aims to make history by winning...

item.title: Three Thieves Steal Car Grill in Broad Daylight in Parklands, Nairobi
item.description: On Monday, May 11, 2026, a shocking theft occurred along Parklands Road, Nairobi, where three young thieves were caught on dashcam stealing the front grill of a car stuck in traffic near the Universit...

item.title: Grace Ives Discusses Authenticity, Third Album 'Girlfriend', and Supporting Olivia Rodrigo on Tour

item.title: Report Show 1,326 Attacks on Naija Journalists, 28 Dead Over Nine Years
item.description: One report don show say Nigeria don record 1,326 attacks on journalists within nine years, with 28 of dem dying from di violence. Di data come from one organisation wey dey monitor press freedom for d...

item.title: Elders and Leaders Honour Pa Fasoranti on His 100th Birthday
item.description: For Monday, 11th May 2026, the ancient city of Akure, Ondo State, waka quiet as dignitaries from all walks of life gather to celebrate the 100th birthday of elder statesman and Pan-Yoruba leader, Pa R...

item.title: Internal Conflict in AIADMK: A Faction Supports CM Vijay Over EPS Leadership

item.title: Understanding Fungus Storms and Their Health Risks
item.description: Fungus storms are extreme weather events where strong winds carry microscopic fungal spores across large distances, posing health risks. These spores, often invisible to the human eye, can infiltrate ...

item.title: Dangote Plans $50 Billion IPO For Lekki Refinery, Offering 10% Stake
item.description: Aliko Dangote don talk say him dey plan make him refinery business reach $50 billion valuation ahead of him stock market listing for Nigeria later dis year. The refinery, wey dey Lekki Free Zone, fit ...

item.title: Passengers from hantavirus-affected cruise ship placed under quarantine after several show symptoms
item.description: A French passenger returning from the MV Hondius cruise ship has developed symptoms of hantavirus while being repatriated to France, prompting strict isolation measures. French authorities immediately...

item.title: Preparations Underway for Nilgiris Summer Festival Amidst Election Delay
item.description: The much-awaited Nilgiris summer festival is expected to begin by the end of this week, according to officials from the district administration. Traditionally, the festival features several popular ev...
